subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared with all signs in truth, and hath called out betwixt earth and heaven with a cry whereby hearts were drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر بالحق بکل الایات و نطق بین الارض و السماء بندآء الذی استجذبت عنه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
